meaning: n.光亮,明亮,聪明,智慧,[光]亮度
examples: Her burst of exuberance and her brightness overwhelmed me.
But his night paintings don't exactly lack brightness.
They think of brightness, sunshine, all that yellow and orange.
This leads to a noticeable increase in brightness, richer colors and higher contrast ratio.
In the not-too-distant future, however, they hope to achieve the brightness and contrast of traditional newsprint.
